calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-19-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance or an opposition filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Carl Sauceda, CSR#2031. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-15-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-15-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly from Dept. 206 for the Court to place terms of the settlement on the record. Richard Morton, Esq. who was authorized to accept the terms of the settlement, appeared on behalf of American Protection Insurance Company; and Chantel Fitting, Esq. appeared on behalf of the intervenor, Ernie Stansberry, who was present. Terms of the settlement were recited by Miss Fitting. Defendant to pay a total of $175,000 split into 2 payments ( 1 check for $20,500 made payable to American Protection Insurance Company and another check for $154,500 to be made payable to Mr. & Mrs. Stansberry )
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/R.Edwards, CSR: Tony Vauhn # 6185.
